data_source: GitHub Issues API (discussion-labeled issues) + high-engagement issue threads
note: GitHub Discussions GraphQL not available in remote execution environment. Analysis derived from issues with 'discussion' / 'help wanted' labels and high-engagement issue threads.

hot_topics.topic: Log file disk space explosion (dual reports, 13+ days open)
hot_topics.note: Two separate reports: 17GB+ via hardcoded log path (#16142, 6 days) and 26GB+ via auto-updater HTTP 418 retry loop (#15947, 13 days). Both open, no fix merged.
29 sessions hard-deleted via internal API (soft:false). No recovery. Open 7 days.
App hangs unrecoverably when context is too large. 4 comments, 6 days open, no resolution.

Security fix PR #13892 (GHSA-p6vw-w3p8-4g72) removed file:// whitelist, breaking knowledge base local file opening. Users cannot open referenced local files. Proposed fix: scoped IPC channel restricted to Data/Files/ directory.
Deleted messages in UI persist in Claude Code SDK .jsonl transcript. Ghost messages reappear on --resume.
Startup recovery re-dispatches a retry job already running — race condition producing duplicate work.
Quick assistant window intercepts mouse clicks/scrolling after being dismissed — invisible phantom window blocks UI.
DeJeune opened 8 page-carve PRs Jun 21 bringing v2 pages onto main (additive/dormant). All in review. New PRs today: migration-v2-window redesign (#16314) + per-message entity snapshot (#16316).
RESOLVED Jun 22: #16245 merged (fix: skip unreachable MCP servers during agent startup). #16242 closed.

hot_topics.topic: Agent stale proxy ECONNREFUSED likely resolved
hot_topics.note: PR #16252 merged (fix(claude-code): skip stale system proxy in agent subprocess env) — likely closes #16016.

community_sentiment.observation: Open issues increased by 7 (937→944) from yesterday — 45 new issues in last 7 days shows sustained high user activity. Four CRITICAL disk/data-loss bugs remain open with no fix merged (oldest now 13 days). One new HIGH bug today (#16313, KB file regression). Dev velocity very high: 165 PRs merged in 30 days (5.5/day). v2 sprint producing results with MCP graceful degradation and proxy fix resolved.
community_sentiment.knowledge_sprint: eeee0717 driving knowledge v2 feature: 17 merged PRs in 30d
community_sentiment.alert: CRITICAL: #15947 and #16142 (disk exhaustion) + #16082 (data loss) remain unresolved for 6-13 days. NEW: #16313 KB file:// regression needs priority fix.
